content:
@everyone Some updates!

1. I've updated the visual guide in <#1419429157779280035>
2. I've prepared the <#1446619934565204231> channel 
3. The following categories are now (or should be) fully ready in my coordination repo:

- Text Messages (Communicator)
- All Story, including but not limited to:
  - Main Story through Arc 2 Chapter 4
  - All Special Ops
  - All Psyche Deepdive
  - All Dreamscapes
- Interlude Menu Stages

The next things I have my sights set on are:
- Wheels of Destiny Flavor Text
- Resonances Flavor Text
- Awakeners (Story, Voicelines, Flavor Text)
